title: Sea cow
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''sea cow''' was a [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] creature. [[Water/Legends|Aquatic]] cows could be found on [[Chad/Legends|Chad]] and could occasionally become trapped under [[Water/Legends|ice]]. [[Callista Ming]] and her family had a herd of the creatures as part of their deep-sea ranch.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-10-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]''
*<!-- 2014-12-23 -->[[Stay on Target (sourcebook)|''Stay on Target'']]

|es=Vaca marina
